name: Grifo & Chung LLC
description_short: Philadelphia-based law firm specializing in civil litigation, real estate, and bankruptcy matters. Partners Rosario Grifo and Paul Chung serve clients across income levels with competitive hourly rates.
description_long: Grifo & Chung LLC is a civil litigation and general practice law firm based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, located at 30 South 15th Street. Founded by partners Rosario Grifo and Paul Chung, the firm serves the Philadelphia area with a stated mission to prioritize client cases and provide informed legal guidance on complex matters. The firm explicitly states it serves clients 'from across the income spectrum ranging from small estates to high net worth individuals,' indicating accessibility to diverse economic backgrounds. The firm emphasizes immersion in Philadelphia communities and long-term client relationships. Grifo & Chung offers a broad array of legal services across multiple practice areas including real estate law, estate planning, municipal law, civil litigation, corporate formation, and asset recovery. The firm markets itself on skilled negotiation and litigation capabilities, positioning attorneys as capable of devising 'creative solutions and effective strategies' for clients. Their website emphasizes competitive hourly rates and alternative fee structures designed to maximize client budgets. The firm appears to function as a general practice boutique rather than a bankruptcy-specialized shop, though bankruptcy handling falls within their civil litigation scope. Their stated vision centers on accessibility—having 'an attorney on-hand and available to answer all of your legal questions and concerns.' Service delivery is framed around timely, cost-effective legal counsel navigated by attorneys with system knowledge. No specific bankruptcy statistics, case results, or client testimonials are provided on the website.
pros: Multiple practice areas allow handling of complex cases spanning real estate, estates, and litigation simultaneously
Explicitly offers alternative fee structures beyond hourly billing to accommodate different client budgets
Serves clients across income spectrum, from modest estates to high-net-worth individuals
Located in central Philadelphia with established office infrastructure (15th floor location)
Partners maintain direct phone access (267-777-9127) for client communication
Offers both judgment collection and asset recovery services, useful for post-bankruptcy situations
Stated focus on negotiation skills and strategic problem-solving rather than commoditized services
cons: Website provides no bankruptcy-specific information, case results, or relevant experience metrics
No mention of chapter 7 vs. chapter 13 specialization or bankruptcy filing volume
No client testimonials or case results provided to evaluate competency or success rates
Appears to be a general practice firm rather than bankruptcy-specialized practice
No information about whether attorneys hold any specialized bankruptcy certifications or board designations
best_for: Philadelphia-area residents needing civil litigation representation with potential bankruptcy components
Clients seeking a general practice attorney for complex matters spanning real estate, estates, and litigation
Small to mid-market business owners and professionals needing integrated legal services
diagnosis: Grifo & Chung functions as a general civil litigation practice with bankruptcy filing capability rather than a dedicated bankruptcy firm. Best for Philadelphia clients needing integrated legal services across multiple areas (real estate, estates, litigation) with bankruptcy components, but not ideal as a primary bankruptcy specialist choice. Caveat: Website lacks bankruptcy-specific information, making it impossible to assess true specialization level or comparative success rates in chapter proceedings.
services: Foreclosure representation and post-sheriff's sale litigation
Real estate tax appeals and abatement
Corporate formation and operating agreement drafting
Asset recovery and unclaimed funds location
